branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed v9.0 direction review and open the first External Runtime Operator Acceptance and Safety Drill implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v8.9 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v9.0 External Runtime Operator Acceptance and Safety Drill: prove a human operator can inspect the approved, reproduced, rollback-ready, outcome, and learning chain and decide accept, stop, rollback, or escalate before controlled provider execution.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed v9.0 direction review and open the first External Runtime Operator Acceptance and Safety Drill implementation task.
